sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: NA / Not Available

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: An enclitic indefinite pronoun; some or any person or object: - a (kind of), any (man, thing, thing at all), certain (thing), divers, he (every) man, one (X thing), ought, + partly, some (man, -body, -thing, -what), (+ that no-) thing, what (-soever), X wherewith, whom [-soever], whose ([-soever]).
